name: consent-mode-v2
description: Google Consent Mode v2 (block-before-consent) + a gated GA4 tag, with a consent banner that meets Québec Loi 25 / GDPR.
author: Tamarak (https://tamarak.dev)

scripts.build: npm run build:assets && npm run i18n
scripts.i18n: npm run i18n:pot && npm run i18n:po && npm run i18n:mo
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:php
scripts.package: npm run build && wp package install wp-cli/dist-archive-command:^3 && wp dist-archive . ./consent-mode-v2.zip --plugin-dirname=consent-mode-v2 --force
